sequence.condition: !q.block_property('block:source') && ((q.block_property('block:depth') == 5 && !q.block_neighbor_has_any_tag(0, 1, 0, 'fluid')) || (q.block_property('block:depth') == 1 && !(q.block_neighbor_has_any_tag(1, 0, 0, 'fluid_2') || q.block_neighbor_has_any_tag(-1, 0, 0, 'fluid_2') || q.block_neighbor_has_any_tag(0, 0, 1, 'fluid_2') || q.block_neighbor_has_any_tag(0, 0, -1, 'fluid_2')) || q.block_property('block:depth') == 2 && !(q.block_neighbor_has_any_tag(1, 0, 0, 'fluid_3') || q.block_neighbor_has_any_tag(-1, 0, 0, 'fluid_3') || q.block_neighbor_has_any_tag(0, 0, 1, 'fluid_3') || q.block_neighbor_has_any_tag(0, 0, -1, 'fluid_3'))) || (q.block_property('block:depth') == 3 && !(q.block_neighbor_has_any_tag(1, 0, 0, 'fluid_4', 'fluid_5') || q.block_neighbor_has_any_tag(-1, 0, 0, 'fluid_4', 'fluid_5') || q.block_neighbor_has_any_tag(0, 0, 1, 'fluid_4', 'fluid_5') || q.block_neighbor_has_any_tag(0, 0, -1, 'fluid_4', 'fluid_5'))))
